ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., COMPACT, SUV - SMALL) */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle (e.g., Sedan, Coupe, SUV) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the vehicle */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in kg */,
  "manufacturer_country" TEXT /* Country of manufacture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specs" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., Inline, V, Rotary) */,
  "fuel_system" TEXT /* Type of fuel system (e.g., MPFI, GDI) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., AS5, M6) */,
  "num_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_transmissions" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Z for gasoline) */,
  "fuel_description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel consumption record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "city_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption in the city (L/100km) */,
  "highway_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption on the highway (L/100km) */,
  "combined_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (L/100km) */,
  "combined_fuel_consumption_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel consumption (mpg) */,
  "fuel_economy_rating" TEXT /* Fuel economy rating (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_consumption_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co2_emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CO2 emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "co2_emissions" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions (g/km) */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co2_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, marketer, dealer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle version */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle version */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was launched */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_versions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory compliance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance with the regulation */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was achieved */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sales */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales occurred */,
  "discount_offered" REAL /* Discount offered on the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
